Name: Time until SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: SW-EIC Reject Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-EIC Reject compared to the average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time until SW-EIC Reject compared to the average time until SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average duration of the SW-EIC Reject activity compared to the average duration of the SW-EIC Accept activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-EIC Reject and the end of the case

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-EIC Reject in the variant ending with SW-EIC Reject versus variants ending with other EIC decisions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Total time from manuscript submission (Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation) to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from the start of the review process (SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion) to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time between the final reviewer agreement (SW-Reviewer Agreed) and the SW-EIC Reject decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from the last reviewer activity (SW-Reviewer Agreed/Declined/Unavailable) to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between the completion of the initial review phase (SW-Awaiting EIC Decision) and the SW-EIC Reject decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for the SW-EIC Reject decision phase compared to the average time for the SW-EIC Major Revision decision phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-EIC Reject and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time from the first reviewer invitation (SW-AE Assign Reviewers) to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time spent in activities preceding SW-EIC Reject compared to the total time spent in activities preceding SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from the last editor assignment (SW-AE Assign Reviewers) to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time between the completion of plagiarism check (Plagiarism Originality Report Completed) and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time to SW-EIC Reject since the manuscript export (Manuscript Export Succeeded)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average resolution time of the SW-EIC Reject decision activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-EIC Reject and the end of the case

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'
